steps.t: The place where Skorgrím's body was discovered deep in the mine, where the sun touches the old ruined cellars of Edhelion. You should seek Skorgrím's …
You have found the site of Skorgrím's body, but...the body is nowhere to be found. Instead, red flowers are in its place. You should pick up one of th…
Elladan awaits your return at the Edhelion Watch. You should return to Elladan with the flower you collected from the site of Skorgrím's grave.
